objective: Train MedGemma to visually recognize Lontong, a Southeast Asian compressed rice cake dish with coconut vegetable curry, capturing its product form, texture, ingredients, cultural context, culinary use, and allergen cues.

hero_product: photorealistic Malay lontong dish with compressed rice cake cubes and yellow coconut vegetable curry
Singapore Malay lontong served on plate with long beans, cabbage, carrot, tofu puffs, and hard-boiled egg in coconut curry
Javanese lontong sayur with firm compressed rice cakes immersed in turmeric coconut milk vegetable curry
macro_texture: close-up of compressed rice cake cubes showing dense firm gelatinized texture from boiling and steaming
detailed texture of yellow coconut milk vegetable curry with visible long beans, cabbage, carrot, and tofu puffs
surface texture of lontong curry showing turmeric, lemongrass, and galangal spices in rich coconut gravy
raw_ingredients_and_process: compressed rice cake wrapped in banana leaf or plastic sleeve before cutting
fresh long beans, cabbage, carrot, tofu puffs, hard-boiled eggs as lontong curry ingredients
photorealistic turmeric, galangal, lemongrass roots and coconut milk used in lontong curry preparation
in_the_wild_context: Malay breakfast hawker stall serving lontong with sambal and serunding kelapa accompaniments
Hari Raya festive table featuring lontong alongside ketupat and other Malay dishes
Singapore hawker centre plate of lontong with typical garnishes and side sambal in natural dining setting
culinary_application: lontong served as a breakfast or lunch dish in Malay cuisine with coconut vegetable curry
traditional lontong presentation with sambal and serunding kelapa coconut floss on side
lontong paired with ketupat and nasi padang dishes in Southeast Asian meal context
label_truth: close-up photo of lontong dish highlighting visible hard-boiled egg and tofu puffs allergens
photorealistic lontong plate showing presence of possible crustacean-based belacan in curry
image emphasizing lontong as halal, gluten-free, dairy-free Malay rice cake curry dish
